/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/samples.dir/car.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/donut.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/doohickey.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/human.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/sample.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/sample_benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/sample_bodies.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/sample_collision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/sample_continuous.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/sample_determinism.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/sample_events.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/sample_geometry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/sample_joints.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/sample_robustness.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/sample_shapes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/sample_stacking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/sample_world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/settings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/samples.dir/shader.cpp.o -o ../bin/samples  ../src/libbox2d.a libimgui.a ../_deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a libglad.a ../_deps/enkits-build/libenkiTS.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
